[[File:Dragon crossbow detail.png|left|130px]]
The '''dragon crossbow''' is a [[Crossbow (weapon)|crossbow]] that is stronger than the [[rune crossbow]]. It requires a [[Ranged]] level of 64 to wield, and can fire [[bolts]] up to [[dragon bolts]]. It has an attack range of 7 increased to 9 with longrange.

Dragon crossbows can be made through the [[Fletching]] skill at level 78; a player must first cut a [[magic stock]] for the crossbow from [[magic logs]], granting 70 Fletching [[experience]]. Then, a player must add [[dragon limbs]] to the stock with a hammer in their inventory, granting 135 experience and making an [[dragon crossbow (u)|unstrung dragon crossbow]]. Finally, they must string the crossbow with a [[crossbow string]], granting 70 experience. Creating a dragon crossbow from raw materials grants 275 Fletching experience in total. A dragon crossbow can be changed cosmetically by using a [[Bounty hunter ornament kit]] on it to become a [[dragon crossbow (cr)]]. The ornament kit can be obtained by participating in [[Bounty Hunter]] and earning 50 Bounty Hunter Points needed to purchase one from the [[Bounty Hunter Store]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Annihilate.gif|thumb|270px|A player performs the special attack of the Dragon crossbow, ''Annihilate''.]]
The crossbow has a [[special attack]], ''Annihilate'', which drains 60% of the special attack bar and hits up to 9 enemies in a 3x3 area. The player will roll for accuracy, and if it succeeds, then rolls for a hit between 0 and the usual maximum hit from the regular attack. The primary target of Annihilate will take 20% extra damage, and all other targets will take 20% less damage. For example, if a hit of 25 is rolled, the primary target will get 30 damage and the other targets will get 20 damage. If used in a [[single-way combat]] area, the attack will still work but only hit one target with 20% extra damage. 

[[Enchanted bolt]]s cannot activate their effects when using the dragon crossbow's special attack.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/950832168426754048|date=9 January 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/97662|archivedate=20 May 2023|quote=It does not have a chance to do the special effect during the special attack, correct.}}
